concerns.text: Direct constitutional contradiction: Constitution Principle VII states 'All statistical claims...MUST include explicit significance thresholds (p-values, confidence intervals)' while FR-006 states 'p-values are NOT reported for census data'. The Assumptions section documents an exception but the Constitution itself was NOT amended. This is a direct contradiction that must be resolved by either amending Principle VII to add a census-data exception clause, or revising FR-006.

FR-001 states 'for all prime knots with crossing number up to a predefined complexity limit' but the actual limit (≤13 crossings) is not explicitly stated. Per maintainer decision, this should be '≤ 13 crossings' to match SC-001 and Assumptions. Currently ambiguous for verifiability.

FR-003 contains excessive inline caveats ('Phase 1 Implementation Exclusion', 'Phase 2+ Timeline', 'Threshold Distinction', etc.) creating maintenance burden. Per maintainer decision, move Phase 2+ scope notes to dedicated section or Assumptions and keep one concise Phase-1 note.

SC-005 states 'A high proportion of knots with computable invariants have all invariants populated' — 'high proportion' is not quantified. Per maintainer decision, substitute '≥ 95% of knots with computable invariants have all invariants populated'.
SC-010 states 'achieves a high match threshold for pass/fail status' — 'high match threshold' is not defined. Per maintainer decision, substitute '≥ 90% match against reference values'.

SC-011 states 'families with residuals exceeding a specified threshold' — 'specified threshold' is not defined. Per maintainer decision, substitute 'families with residuals exceeding ≥ 2 standard deviations from the fitted trend'.
FR-003 states 'high match threshold' for algorithm validation — should explicitly state the threshold. Per maintainer decision, substitute '≥ 90% match against KnotInfo reference values'.
FR-013 states 'Reference coverage threshold set to a high level' — should explicitly state the threshold. Per maintainer decision, substitute '≥ 90% of cited references resolve to a verified source'.
